The '''''Impenetrable''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] that was a part of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|navy]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="CSWE" /> Manufactured by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] and measuring 1,600 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in length,<ref name="DB" /> it served as the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Danetta Pitta]],<ref name="CSWE" /> who was [[Death/Legends|killed]] while [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanding]] a [[Grand Admiral Pitta's torpedo sphere|torpedo sphere]] in the [[Battle of Tralus (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Tralus]]<ref name="Insider66">{{InsiderCite|66|Who's Who: Imperial Grand Admirals}}</ref> of [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]].<ref name="EGTW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Impenetrable'' was originally created by [[Daniel Wallace]] and [[Abel G. Peña]] and was to be mentioned in an [[Dirty Dozen: The Imperial Grand Admirals|article]] on the Galactic Empire's Grand Admirals that was written for an issue of the ''[[Star Wars Gamer]]'' magazine. The publication of the article was prevented by that magazine's eventual cancellation,<ref name="Blog">{{Blog|danwallace|16|Grand Admirals: What Have They Got in their Pocketsses?}}</ref> although a mention of the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] went on to be included in [[2008]]'s ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''.<ref name="CSWE" />
